ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($User.LastName <> $Label.DataArchiverUser, $Setup.Application_Config_Settings__c.Do_Not_Run_Payment_Validation__c = False, OR( AND(ISCHANGED(Is_Payment_Remitted__c ), Is_Payment_Remitted__c = False), AND(PRIORVALUE(Is_Payment_Remitted__c ) = True, Is_Payment_Remitted__c = True) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Payment is remitted back and now it can not be edited
